scripts.db:push: cd backend && npm run prisma:generate && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx tsc prisma/seed.ts --ignoreConfig --esModuleInterop --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir prisma/dist --skipLibCheck --types node && node prisma/dist/seed.js
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:start && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
